author: andrewboldi
description: Two-way sync with a GitHub repo via REST API. Works on iOS for vaults of any size including images, where git-protocol plugins crash from WebView memory limits. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Andrew Boldi
manifest.description: Two-way sync with a GitHub repo via REST API. Works on iOS for vaults of any size including images, where git-protocol plugins crash from WebView memory limits.
manifest.name: Vault Sync (REST)

name: Vault Sync (REST)

releases.author: andrewboldi
releases.description: Address ObsidianReviewBot feedback: sentence-case UI strings, Setting().setHeading() pattern, Vault#configDir instead of hardcoded .obsidian, drop unused catch params.

releases.author: andrewboldi
releases.description: Plugin id changed: vault-sync → vault-sync-rest (the bare 'vault-sync' was already in use by a different plugin).
releases.name: v1.0.2 — id collision fix

releases.author: andrewboldi
releases.description: Plugin id renamed: obsidian-vault-sync → vault-sync (per community plugin reviewer guidance). authorUrl points to GitHub profile, description aligned with submission. Functionality unchanged. Existing BRAT users: install will appear under new id; uninstall old plugin and re-paste PAT/repo URL in settings.
releases.name: v1.0.1 — id rename for community submission

releases.author: andrewboldi
releases.description: First stable release. Full sync loop working: Seed / Pull / Push / Auto-sync. Ribbon icon + status bar with last commit SHA. Memory bounded per-file, scales to vaults of any size including images. Tested with a real ~840-file / 130 MB vault on iOS 26.3. See README for setup.
releases.name: v1.0.0 — stable

releases.author: andrewboldi
releases.description: Adds: auto-sync interval setting (minutes; 0=off; runs pull then push silently), 'Sync now' command (manual pull+push). Skips .obsidian/plugins/** entirely (per-device plugin installs; protects credentials in plugin data.json files). community-plugins.json still syncs so plugin enablement state is shared.
releases.name: v0.5.0 — auto-sync + cleaner skip rules

releases.author: andrewboldi
releases.description: Adds 'Vault Sync: Push to GitHub' command. Detects local changes via SHA-1 git blob hashing, uploads new blobs, builds delta tree on base_tree, creates atomic commit, advances branch ref. Refuses to push if remote diverged (run Pull first). Skips PAT/workspace/cache files.
releases.name: v0.4.0 — Phase 3 push

releases.author: andrewboldi
releases.description: Adds 'Vault Sync: Pull from GitHub' command. Uses GitHub compare API to find changed files since lastCommitSha, fetches only changed/added files individually, deletes removed ones. Bounded memory, scales to any vault. Detects diverged history (Phase 3 push will resolve).
releases.name: v0.3.0 — Phase 2 incremental pull

releases.author: andrewboldi
releases.description: Replaces in-memory tarball with per-file Git Data API tree-walk + Contents API raw downloads. Bounded memory per file (no longer per vault). Concurrency 8. Persists per-file blob SHAs for upcoming Phase 2 (pull) change detection.
releases.name: v0.2.0 — tree-walk for any vault size

releases.author: andrewboldi
releases.description: Tarball download now uses Obsidian native HTTP (requestUrl) to bypass CORS on codeload.github.com redirect. Decompression and tar parsing remain incremental.
releases.name: v0.1.1 — fix iOS Load Failed

releases.author: andrewboldi
releases.description: Initial seed via streaming tarball. No isomorphic-git, no memory blowup.
releases.name: v0.1.0 — Phase 1 seed
